hooks.command: /bin/bash -lc 'root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; if [[ -z "$root" ]]; then root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; fi; cat "$root/CLAUDE.md"'
/bin/bash -lc 'root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; if [[ -z "$root" ]]; then root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; fi; bash "$root/.agents/hooks/scripts/check-careful.sh"'
/bin/bash -lc 'root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; if [[ -z "$root" ]]; then root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; fi; python3 "$root/.agents/hooks/scripts/post_tool_use_review.py"'
/bin/bash -lc 'root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; if [[ -z "$root" ]]; then root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; fi; python3 "$root/.agents/hooks/scripts/stop_review_gate.py"'
